title: Image To Image Thai Baht Coin Stack Count
sourceTitle: Image To Image Thai Baht Coin Stack Count Edit AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image coin-count photo edit using uploaded coin stack photo before Thai baht total correction, adjusting visible coin stacks so the total becomes 244.5 Thai baht total. Subject: The coin stacks remain realistic and countable while each stack must be countable from the visible coin edges and top coins and specific accuracy note variant with readable visual details. Scene: Original tabletop coin photo is preserved as much as possible, with only the number of coins in each stack adjusted to meet the target total. Composition: Keep the same camera angle, hand or table context if present, stack positions, denomination visibility, and photo realism while editing the coin counts. Signature Elements: Preserved image to image thai baht coin stack count edit source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Original photo colors preserved, Thai baht coin metallic tones, natural tabletop neutrals, and realistic highlight/shadow color. Lighting: Preserve the original lighting direction and exposure, with realistic coin reflections and consistent shadows under edited stacks. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

imagePrompts.title: Image To Image Thai Baht Coin Stack Count Edit Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image coin-count photo edit using provided tabletop coin photo before exact-total adjustment, adjusting visible coin stacks so the total becomes 244.5 baht. Subject: The coin stacks remain realistic and countable while all stack heights and top denominations remain clearly visible and combined Thai baht coin value equals 244.5 without hidden coins. Scene: Original tabletop coin photo is preserved as much as possible, with only the number of coins in each stack adjusted to meet the target total. Composition: Keep the same camera angle, hand or table context if present, stack positions, denomination visibility, and photo realism while editing the coin counts. Signature Elements: Preserved image to image thai baht coin stack count edit source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Original photo colors preserved, Thai baht coin metallic tones, natural tabletop neutrals, and realistic highlight/shadow color. Lighting: Preserve the original lighting direction and exposure, with realistic coin reflections and consistent shadows under edited stacks. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
